thread.title: Itawamba VSO hires Ganaway as second full-time officer | News | djournal.com
thread.title_full: Itawamba VSO hires Ganaway as second full-time officer | News | djournal.com

author: BEN SUTTON Itawamba County Times
title: Itawamba VSO hires Ganaway as second full-time officer | News | djournal.com
text:
Itawamba County veterans should now have more ready access to the help they need from the county's Veterans Services Office.
The Itawamba County Board of Supervisors moved to hire Fulton native Stephen Ganaway as a full time Veteran Services Officer for the county during their meeting on Monday, Oct. 7. Ganaway joins longtime Itawamba County VSO Jason Baker as the second full-time VSO for the county after serving in a part-time role since July of this year.
